tools.name: search_blog_posts
tools.description: Search the SCA Zandomeni legal blog (~550 articles, Romanian) by keyword against article slugs. Returns matching URLs on zandomeni.eu.

tools.name: get_blog_post
tools.description: Fetch a single SCA Zandomeni blog article by slug. Returns title, description, canonical URL and article text.

tools.name: list_expertise_areas
tools.description: List the practice areas covered by SCA Zandomeni (Timișoara) with links to each area page.

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Return the public contact details of SCA Zandomeni — Timișoara (phone, email, website, service area).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_blog_posts, get_blog_post, get_contact_info · Private data: get_contact_info · Public sink: get_blog_post, get_contact_info.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_blog_posts, get_blog_post, get_contact_info · Private data: get_contact_info · Public sink: get_blog_post, get_contact_info

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
